title: The Death of the Governor of Khurasan and What Brought It About
description: Brought It About It is related that one night some members of the army became so stirred up against Abu Dawud Khalid b. Ibrahim, then Abu Ja`far al-Mangur 's governor in Khurasan, that they converged on the house where he lived near the Kushmahan270 gate in the city of Marw.271 Perched on the edge of a protruding brick, Abu Dawud looked down from the parapet and began to shout out to his confederates so that they would recognize his voice.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
